name: TaxCloud Sales Tax Compliance API
what_it_does: US sales tax compliance platform with REST and SOAP API — enabling e-commerce merchants to calculate real-time sales tax for all US states, manage exemption certificates, file returns automatically, and achieve Streamlined Sales and Use Tax (SST) compliance, with free access for SST participating states and pay-per-state pricing for non-SST states.
use_cases: Calculating US sales tax in real-time via TaxCloud API for e-commerce checkout
Managing customer tax exemption certificates via TaxCloud for B2B wholesale compliance
Automating sales tax return filing via TaxCloud for multi-state e-commerce merchants
Achieving SST compliance via TaxCloud free tier for small merchants in SST states
Handling sales tax for marketplace sellers via TaxCloud API for platform compliance
not_for: International VAT compliance (TaxCloud is US-only sales tax)
Large enterprise with complex nexus requirements needing dedicated tax counsel
Non-e-commerce sales tax (TaxCloud is transaction-based, not advisory)
best_when: A US e-commerce merchant needs affordable, Streamlined Sales Tax-compliant tax calculation — where TaxCloud offers free compliance for SST member states and low per-transaction costs for full US coverage.
avoid_when: You need international VAT/GST, complex transfer pricing, or enterprise tax advisory services.

auth.notes: API ID (login ID) and API Key pair for authentication. Both required for all API calls. REST API via JSON. Legacy SOAP API also supported. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. API credentials from TaxCloud account dashboard. PHP, .NET, JavaScript, Python client libraries. No webhooks — REST pull model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for Streamlined Sales Tax (SST) member states — no per-transaction fee
pricing.notes: Founded 2009. Based in US. SST Certified Service Provider — free access funded by participating states. 24 SST member states (largest states including TX, OH, IN, NE). Non-SST states (CA, NY, TX non-SST) have per-state fees. Used by: WooCommerce, Magento, PrestaShop (official plugins). Economic nexus tracking post-Wayfair. Exemption certificate management included. TIC (Taxability Information Code) system for product classification. Return filing in SST states included free. Small to mid-market merchant focus. Not Avalara/TaxJar scale.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST + legacy SOAP API. API ID + API Key auth pair. PHP/.NET/JS/Python SDKs. No webhooks. US-only. SST member states free. Good developer documentation. Official plugins for major e-commerce platforms.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Tax lookup (Lookup) calls fully idempotent for same cart. AuthorizedWithCapture for finalizing transactions — not idempotent. Returned (refund) calls not idempotent. Use transaction IDs for idempotency tracking.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires both API ID (login ID) AND API Key — two separate credentials in every request
SST member states are FREE — only non-SST states cost money per-state
TIC (Taxability Information Code) required per cart item for correct product tax classification
Legacy SOAP API still functional — REST is preferred for new integrations
US-only — no VAT/GST for international sales

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API ID + Key pair authentication. SOC2 compliance. US data residency. Transaction data (purchase amounts, addresses) is sensitive. No OAuth2 scope granularity. SST Certified Service Provider — regulatory oversight. Customer PII (addresses) transmitted for tax calculation.
